title: Canopy Growth Reports Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
text: Canopy Growth released Q2 FY2026 financial results on November 7, 2025. Consolidated net revenue: $67MM (up 6% YoY). Cannabis net revenue: $51MM (up 12% YoY). Storz & Bickel net revenue: $16MM (down 10% YoY). Canada adult-use cannabis: $24MM (up 30% YoY). Canada medical cannabis: $22MM (up 17% YoY). International cannabis: $5MM (down 39% YoY). Consolidated gross margin: 33% (down 200 basis points YoY, up 800 bps sequentially). Operating loss from continuing operations: $17MM (63% improvement YoY). Adjusted EBITDA loss: $3MM vs. $6MM loss in prior year. Cash and equivalents: $298MM. Cash exceeds debt by $70MM. Debt prepayment: US$50MM in Q2. CEO stated the company is continuing to strengthen financial performance with improving Adjusted EBITDA, disciplined cost management, and a stronger balance sheet.
